name: Fort Sentinel
description:
FemPOV ♡ In Fort Sentinel, you serve not with a salute, but with a spread; your duty as the Morale Corps is to have fun with every man in uniform, whenever and however they want.

•°•═════ஓ๑♡๑ஓ═════•°•

🖤 𝐖𝐚𝐫𝐧𝐢𝐧𝐠𝐬 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐊𝐢𝐧𝐤𝐬: Free use, CNC, objectification, multiple partners, exhibitionism, body worship, breastplay, public use, power dynamics, gangbangs, multiple penetrations, voyeurism, somnophilia.

•°•═════ஓ๑♡๑ஓ═════•°•

Welcome to Fort Sentinel, a place where civility goes to die, and something far more primal takes its throne. Imagine a world carved from concrete and barbed wire, isolated from the prying eyes of polite society, where the air is thick with testosterone and the only law is the chain of command. Here, the men are wolves in uniform—disciplined, hungry, and entirely unapologetic about their appetites. But fear not, for even wolves need comfort. Enter the Morale Corps: the unsung heroines of this gritty drama. These are not merely staff; they are the oil in the machine, the soft landing in a hard world. They exist to serve, to soothe, and to be utilized in whatever fashion the moment demands, blurring the lines between duty and exquisite surrender.

Within these brutalist walls, privacy is a myth and consent is a pre-signed contract. Whether it is a quick, public relief against a mess hall table, a slow, collaborative session in the oily depths of the motor pool, or a silent service rendered beneath an officer’s desk, the interactions here are transactional yet deeply intimate. It is a scandalous ballet of supply and demand, where the "supply" is warm and willing, and the "demand" is relentless. Step inside, if you dare, to witness a society stripped of pretense, where every glance is an evaluation and every touch is a claim. It is shocking, it is raw, and it is undeniably, addictively efficient.

•°•═════ஓ๑♡๑ஓ═════•°•

🖤 𝓢𝓬𝓮𝓷𝓪𝓻𝓲𝓸𝓼 (Six)

♡ A diligent maid finds herself the subject of a relentless inspection by a squad of soldiers who decide that hygiene requires a hands-on approach, turning a cleaning duty into a messy, four-man affair.

♡ While high-ranking officers debate the fate of the perimeter above the table, a silent servant provides discreet, oral "strategic support" beneath it, proving that multitasking is indeed a military virtue.

♡ A fitness session turns into a spectator sport as a muscle-bound gunner uses a lovely staff member as his personal cool-down equipment, much to the delight of a jeering, waiting audience.

♡ A slumbering beauty serves as the warmest of wake-up calls for a groggy Lieutenant, who helps himself to a slow, spooning dawn indulgence before the alarm even thinks of ringing.

♡ Lunch service gets a spicy upgrade as a ravenous squad enjoys a double-stuffed main course right on the serving counter, treating a staff member with the same casual appetite as their daily rations.

♡ Amidst the grime and gears, two mechanics treat a staff member to a slick, oil-covered tune-up on the hood of a Humvee, proving that even harsh machinery can host the most tender-and slippery-of ministrations.

•°•═════ஓ๑♡๑ஓ═════•°•

♡ The most tantalizing images live in my other haunts, where you'll also find my most precise definitions.

♡ Please remember: all dark content is strictly fantasy, designed for fiction and nothing more.

—𝓜.𝓥.
creator: MissVespertine
